executive_summary.overall_status: FAILED - 3 critical issues require immediate remediation

critical_issues.title: Hardcoded $HOME path in harness-delegation-inspection
critical_issues.impact: Skill completely broken on any system except developer's - uses $HOME/.claude/get-shit-done/
critical_issues.remediation: Replace with environment variable ${OPENCODE_HARNESS_BIN_DIR} or similar

critical_issues.title: Wildcard skill permission + profanity in build.md
critical_issues.impact: Privilege escalation - skill: *: allow grants full admin access; vulgar language violates professional standards
critical_issues.remediation: Delete build.md or strip wildcard permissions and rewrite with professional language

critical_issues.title: Excessive permissions without scoping in conductor.md
critical_issues.impact: Violates least-privilege security principle - read/edit/write/bash/task/skill all set to allow with no restrictions

warnings.title: Missing frontmatter in deep-init.md and deep-research-synthesis-repomix.md
evidence: Both files start with content directly, no --- delimiters

warnings.title: Dangling skill references - skill-creator and skill-judge don't exist
Non-standard agent schema in orchestrator.md
evidence: orchestrator.md:1-9 uses textVerbosity + nested skill instead of permission record

warnings.title: Role overlap - coordinator and conductor both labeled primary orchestrator
evidence: coordinator.md and conductor.md have near-identical role descriptions

warnings.title: Tool allowlists not implemented - AGENT_TOOLS referenced in docs but no code
evidence: plugin.ts has no corresponding AGENT_TOOLS implementation

warnings.title: Task config schema gaps - missing priority, constraints, category fields
evidence: DelegateTaskInputSchema missing priority despite concurrency.ts:24 accepting QueuePriority
DelegateTaskInputSchema missing constraints despite lifecycle-manager.ts:31 supporting them
DelegateTaskInputSchema missing category despite DelegationMeta having it

warnings.title: Generic trigger phrases in hm-deep-research and hm-detective
evidence: hm-deep-research:3 - triggers: 'research, investigate, analyze, compare, explore, evaluate, deep dive'
hm-detective:3 - triggers: 'navigate codebase, read efficiently, search across files, understand this codebase'

warnings.title: Orchestrator hierarchy confusion - 4 agents serve as primary orchestrator
evidence: coordinator, conductor, hivefiver, orchestrator all labeled primary orchestrator

warnings.title: Intentional trigger overlaps between meta-builder and specialist skills
evidence: meta-builder routes to use-authoring-skills, command-dev, custom-tools-dev, agents-and-subagents-dev

cross_phase_risks.title: Governance stripped + wildcard permissions = privilege escalation
cross_phase_risks.propagation: build.md skill:*:allow combined with AGENT_TOOLS not implemented means no tool restrictions enforced

cross_phase_risks.title: Dangling skill refs + missing files_to_read = cascade failure
cross_phase_risks.propagation: skill-creator/skill-judge don't exist + scripts not declared = agent load failures

cross_phase_risks.title: Portability gap
cross_phase_risks.propagation: $HOME hardcoded + /Users/apple/ absolute paths = complete failure on other systems

cross_phase_risks.title: Role overlap creates delegation ambiguity
cross_phase_risks.propagation: meta-builder routing intentional; coordinator/conductor overlap unintentional = wrong agent spawned

phase_4_permissions.notes: 2 medium issues are intentional security hardening patterns

immediate: Remove or rewrite build.md (delete wildcard permissions, remove profanity)
Fix conductor.md permissions - apply ask-by-default pattern like coordinator.md
short_term: Add proper --- frontmatter to deep-init.md and deep-research-synthesis-repomix.md
Quote all bare $ARGUMENTS in 4 command files
Add files_to_read blocks to 5 skills that reference scripts
Either create skill-creator.md and skill-judge.md or remove dangling references
Implement AGENT_TOOLS in plugin.ts or document tool restrictions are not enforced
long_term: Consolidate orchestrator hierarchy - clarify coordinator vs conductor vs hivefiver vs orchestrator
Fix orchestrator.md to use standard permission record schema
Complete DelegateTaskInputSchema with priority, constraints, category fields
Specialize generic triggers in hm-deep-research and hm-detective
